steps.t: Khôltekh has asked that you deploy traps along the northern walls of Khabârkhad in the Umbar-môkh. He has directed you to speak with Nûru, who can be …
Nûru told you to go far to the north, outside Khabârkhad, to Tilmakhím in Tâkhdar. There, a vendor named Mâramit will give you the traps Khôltekh aske…
Go south of Tilmakhím, to the northern edge of Khabârkhad, near Lôkhalel, and deploy the traps Mâramit gave you.
Return to Khôltekh in Dâr Laja, the Hall of the Kindred.
